name: Robin
desc: A Halovian singer who was born in Penacony and has risen to cosmic fame. An elegant and demure young lady.\nThis time, she has been invited home by The Family to grace everyone with song during the Charmony Festival.\nShe can use the power of "Harmony" to broadcast her music, manifesting "resonance" among not only her fans but all manner of lifeforms.

1.name: Land of Smiles
1.desc: While the "Concerto" state is active, all allies' All-Type <u>RES PEN</u> increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

2.name: Afternoon Tea For Two
2.desc: While the "Concerto" state is active, all allies' SPD increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. The Talent's Energy Regeneration effect additionally increases by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>.

3.name: Inverted Tuning
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nUltimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: Raindrop Key
4.desc: When using the Ultimate, dispels <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> from all allies. While Robin is in the "Concerto" state, increases the Effect RES of all allies by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000011.name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominance, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock, Happiness Puppet, Grudge Ablaze.

5.name: Lonestar's Lament
5.desc: Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Moonless Midnight
6.desc: While the "Concerto" state is active, the CRIT DMG for the Physical <u>Additional DMG</u> caused by the Ultimate increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. The effect of "Moonless Midnight" can trigger up to <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s) and the trigger count resets each time the Ultimate is used.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

130901.name: Wingflip White Noise
130901.desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Robin's ATK to one designated enemy target.
130901.simple_desc: Deals minor Physical DMG to one enemy.

130902.name: Pinion's Aria
130902.desc: Increase DMG dealt by all allies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s). This duration decreases by 1 at the start of Robin's every turn.

130903.name: Vox Harmonique, Opus Cosmique
130903.desc:
Robin enters the "Concerto" state and makes all teammates (i.e., excluding this unit) immediately take action.
While in the "Concerto" state, increases all allies' ATK by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Robin's ATK plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>. Moreover, after every attack by ally targets, Robin deals Physical <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of her ATK for 1 time, with a fixed CRIT Rate for this damage set at <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak> and fixed CRIT DMG set at <unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak>.
While in the "Concerto" state, Robin is immune to <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> and cannot enter her turn or take action until the "Concerto" state ends.
A "Concerto" countdown appears in the Action Order. When the countdown's turn begins, Robin exits the "Concerto" state and immediately takes action. The countdown has its own fixed SPD of <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>.
130903.simple_desc: Enters the "Concerto" state, <color=#f29e38ff>increases all allies' ATK</color>, and causes all teammates to immediately take action. After an attack, Robin deals <color=#f29e38ff>Physical <u>Additional DMG</u></color>. While "Concerto" lasts, Robin is immune to <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u>. Before Concerto ends, Robin won't take a turn or action, lasting until the end of the countdown.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

10000011.name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominance, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock, Happiness Puppet, Grudge Ablaze.

130904.name: Tonal Resonance
130904.desc: Increase all allies' CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color>. Moreover, after allies attack enemy targets, Robin additionally regenerates <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Energy for herself.
130904.simple_desc: Increase all allies' <color=#f29e38ff>CRIT DMG</color>. After an ally target attacks the enemy, Robin additionally regenerates Energy.

130906.name: Attack
130906.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

130907.name: Overture of Inebriation
130907.desc: After using Technique, creates a Special Dimension around the character that lasts for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> seconds. Enemies within this dimension will not attack Robin and will follow Robin while the dimension is active. After entering battle while the dimension is active, Robin regenerates <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Energy at the start of each wave. Only 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.
130907.simple_desc: Creates a Special Dimension around the character. Enemies within this dimension will not attack Robin. After entering battle while the dimension is active, Robin additionally regenerates <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> Energy at the start of each wave.

1.point_desc: When the battle begins, <u>action advances</u> this character by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

1.point_desc: While the "Concerto" state is active, the CRIT DMG dealt when all allies launch <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

1.point_desc: When using Skill, additionally regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.
